title_zh: 附录 A · SemiAnalysis 覆盖可信度研究
title_en: Appendix A · SemiAnalysis Coverage Credibility Study
intro_zh: 本书全部内容蒸馏自 SemiAnalysis。读者应当知道这个信息源「能信多少、怎么用」。为此我们独立做了一项事件研究：从 311 篇文章中用 27 个并行代理抽取全部带立场的公司提及（664 个单股事件、119 只股票、看多 384 次/看空 168 次），以发文日为事件日，计算其后 1 个月/1 年/3 年相对费城半导体 ETF（SMH）的几何超额收益。方法上按名字等权、按 ticker 聚类（避免「赢家被反复覆盖」的软前视）、剔除 pre-IPO 前视（ARM/CRWV 等）、退市按末价兑现，并经三轮对抗审计修正八处方法学缺陷。结论一句话：叙事极准，选股无 α——本书用它的方式（理解机制与瓶颈）恰是这个源的正确打开方式。
intro_en: Everything in this book is distilled from SemiAnalysis, so the reader deserves to know how much this source can be trusted, and for what. We ran an independent event study: 27 parallel agents extracted every stance-bearing company mention from 311 articles (664 single-stock events across 119 tickers; 384 bullish / 168 bearish), then measured geometric excess returns vs. the SMH semiconductor ETF over 1M/1Y/3Y from publication date. Methodology: equal-weight by name with ticker clustering (to kill the soft look-ahead of winners being covered repeatedly), pre-IPO look-ahead removed (ARM/CRWV etc.), delistings settled at last price, and three adversarial audit rounds fixing eight methodological defects. One-line verdict: the narratives are remarkably right, but the stock picks carry no alpha — which makes this book's use of the source (mechanisms and bottlenecks, not tickers) exactly the right one.

findings.zh: 唯一显著的领先信号只有约 1 个月：看多组 1M 超额 +2.0%（t=1.63），看多−看空价差 +3.9%（Welch t=2.33）——这是全研究唯一过显著性的正向结果。
findings.en: The only significant leading signal lasts ~1 month: bullish names earn +2.0% excess at 1M (t=1.63), and the bull-minus-bear spread is +3.9% (Welch t=2.33) — the study's only significant positive result.

findings.zh: 长期反转：典型被看多的名字 1 年落后 SMH -5.2%，3 年 -27.2%（t=-4.49，显著为负）。照看多名单买票，输给直接持有 SMH。
findings.en: Long horizons reverse: the typical bullish name lags SMH by -5.2% at 1Y and -27.2% at 3Y (t=-4.49, significantly negative). Buying the bull list loses to simply holding SMH.

findings.zh: 汇总收益是 beta 幻觉：看多组巨大的绝对收益来自半导体牛市 + NVDA 被覆盖 62 次；剔除覆盖最多的 5 只（NVDA/TSM/AMD/GOOGL/AVGO）后，其余看多名字 1 年超额为 -6.1%。
findings.en: Aggregate returns are a beta illusion: the big absolute gains come from the semi bull market plus NVDA being covered 62 times; excluding the five most-covered names (NVDA/TSM/AMD/GOOGL/AVGO), the remaining bullish names' 1Y excess is -6.1%.

findings.zh: 看空比看多准：被看空的名字 1 年落后 SMH -10.7%（t=-2.90，显著）。INTC 被看空 30 次、三星 15 次——都兑现了。「SA 骂谁」比「SA 夸谁」更接近可交易信号。
findings.en: Bearish calls beat bullish ones: bearish names lag SMH by -10.7% at 1Y (t=-2.90, significant). INTC was panned 30 times and Samsung 15 — both played out. Whom SA pans is closer to a tradeable signal than whom it praises.

findings.zh: 「看对行业、买错票」：板块层面唯一跑赢等权同行指数的是 AI 加速器（且完全由 NVDA/AVGO 抬起）；封装/OSAT 与代工板块 3 年反而显著为负。内存短缺、CoWoS 瓶颈、数据中心电力这些叙事全对——但钱被 NVDA/TSM 赚走，同主题的二线名字跑输。
findings.en: Right industry, wrong stock: at sector level only AI accelerators beat an equal-weight peer index (entirely carried by NVDA/AVGO), while packaging/OSAT and foundry are significantly negative at 3Y. The memory-shortage, CoWoS-bottleneck and datacenter-power narratives were all right — but the money went to NVDA/TSM, and same-theme second-tier names underperformed.

bull_note_zh: 看多记分牌（覆盖 ≥5 次的名字；按名等权，相对 SMH 的几何超额）
bull_note_en: Bullish scorecard (names covered ≥5 times; equal-weight by name, geometric excess vs SMH)
bear_note_zh: 看空记分牌（覆盖 ≥3 次；负超额=看空正确）
bear_note_en: Bearish scorecard (covered ≥3 times; negative excess = the bearish call was right)
usage_zh: 使用指南：把 SemiAnalysis 当「机制与瓶颈的显微镜」，不要当「买票清单」。本书提炼的正是前者——产业链结构、瓶颈传导、成本经济学；这些是该源被验证最准的部分。若用于交易：只有约 1 个月的方向漂移可用（且薄），看空 call 值得认真对待，长期请回到组合与 beta 的框架。
usage_en: How to use: treat SemiAnalysis as a microscope on mechanisms and bottlenecks, not a buy list. That is precisely what this book distills — chain structure, bottleneck propagation, cost economics — the parts of the source that verify best. For trading: only the ~1-month drift is usable (and thin), bearish calls deserve real weight, and at long horizons return to a portfolio/beta framework.
caveat_zh: 研究口径：事件=发文日；基准=SMH；语料含 210 篇付费文预览（覆盖全文 79%），立场抽取基于可得文本；本研究为作者独立分析，与 SemiAnalysis 无关联。
caveat_en: Scope: events dated at publication; benchmark = SMH; corpus includes paid-article previews (79% of full text), stances extracted from available text. This is the author's independent analysis, unaffiliated with SemiAnalysis.
